fields.name: Melbourne
fields.meta_title: Melbourne Airport Transfer | Fixed Price & Private (8-13 Seater) | EasyGo
fields.meta_description: Book your Melbourne airport transfer now! Private pickup service with 8-13 seater vehicles. Serving Melbourne CBD, Northern Suburbs & Western Melbourne. Fixed prices, no hidden fees. Available 24/7

terminal_info.name: T1 – International
terminal_info.description: Arrivals at Level 2 (Ground Level). After clearing customs, exit through the sliding doors into the Arrivals Hall. Your EasyGo driver will be waiting with a name board near the exit.

terminal_info.name: T2 – Qantas Domestic
terminal_info.description: Collect your baggage and exit through the main Arrivals door. Your driver meets you on the kerbside directly outside baggage claim.

terminal_info.name: T3 – Virgin / Rex Domestic
terminal_info.description: Connected to T2 via a short walkway. Exit at Ground Level. Your driver meets you at the main kerbside exit.

terminal_info.name: T4 – Budget Airlines (Jetstar & others)
terminal_info.description: Separate terminal on Departure Drive. After collecting baggage, exit through the main doors. Driver meets you on the pick-up kerbside.

fields.meeting_point:
The meeting point will be included in the reminder email EasyGo sends on the day of your arrival — please make sure to check it. The email includes directions and a map to help you find your way.

Your driver will also be available to guide you by phone or text on the day.

The airport is well signposted, so you can also follow the signs. If anything comes up, stay in close contact with your driver — he is there on the day to help you every step of the way.
fields.arrival_guide:
1. Check your email - When your flight lands, open your email and check the reminder email EasyGo sent — it contains your driver's name, phone number, vehicle details, meeting point, and a map.

2. Call or text your driver - Once you have collected your luggage, call or text your driver to let them know you are ready. Your driver will head to the meeting point as soon as they hear from you.

3. Meet your driver - Follow the meeting point instructions in your reminder email. 

4. Important: If anything unexpected happens, please contact your driver or our office immediately by phone or email.

fields.name: Rideshare Pickup
fields.instruction:
• After clearing customs and exiting the Arrivals Hall, follow the signs for “Rideshare & Pickup.”
• Continue to the P7 parking building, then follow the signs for “Rideshare.”

fields.name: Accessible Pickup
fields.instruction:
• After clearing customs, walk to the right end of the Arrivals Hall where McDonald’s is located.
• Exit through the doors next to McDonald’s.
• The Accessible Pick-up area is directly outside and clearly signposted

fields.name: Shuttle Bus Pickup
fields.instruction:
• After clearing customs, walk towards the right side of the Arrivals Hall.
• You will pass McDonald’s. Continue further right and exit the building.
• The Shuttle Bus Pick-up area is located just outside and is clearly signposted.

fields.name: Rideshare Pickup
fields.instruction: Rideshare pickups at T2 are on the kerbside roadway immediately outside the arrivals exit. Follow the 'Rideshare' signage on the footpath. Your driver will confirm the exact bay via the app.

fields.name: Accessible Pickup
fields.instruction: Accessible vehicle pickup is available on the kerbside outside the T2 arrivals exit, in the marked disability bays. Please notify EasyGo in advance to arrange the correct vehicle.

fields.name: Rideshare Pickup
fields.instruction: Rideshare pickups at T3 are on the lower kerbside roadway. Follow the 'Rideshare' signs immediately outside the arrivals exit. Your driver will confirm the exact bay via the app.

fields.name: Accessible Pickup
fields.instruction:
• After collecting your luggage, exit via the door near Carousel 3.
• Use the nearby zebra crossing and cross halfway.
• Accessible Pickup bays are next to the public bus stop.

fields.name: Public Pickup
fields.instruction: Arrivals at Level 2 (Ground Level). After clearing customs, exit through the sliding doors into the Arrivals Hall. Your EasyGo driver will be waiting with a name board near the exit.

fields.name: Rideshare Pickup
fields.instruction: Rideshare pickups are located on Level 1 of the T1 car park. Exit the arrivals hall, take the lift or stairs to Level 1, and follow the 'Rideshare' signs to your bay.

fields.name: Accessible Pickup
fields.instruction: Accessible vehicle pickup is available on the kerbside directly outside the T1 arrivals exit, Level 2, in the marked disability bays. Please notify EasyGo at booking time if you require an accessible vehicle.

fields.name: Shuttle Bus Pickup
fields.instruction: Shared shuttle services depart from the Ground Transport hub on Level 1 of T1. Follow 'Buses & Coaches' signs after exiting customs. EasyGo shared shuttles use the coach bays — your confirmation email will specify the bay number.

fields.name: Public Pickup
fields.instruction: After clearing customs, proceed to the Ground Transport area outside the arrivals level. Follow signage to the pickup bays where your driver will meet you.

fields.name: Rideshare Pickup
fields.instruction: Rideshare pickup is located in the designated rideshare zone outside the international arrivals terminal. Follow signage.

fields.name: Accessible Pickup
fields.instruction: Accessible pickup is available at the kerbside accessible zone directly outside arrivals.

fields.name: Express Pick-up
fields.instruction:
• After exiting the baggage claim area, follow the signs for “Express Pickup”.
• Express Pickup is located in Parking Building P3.

fields.name: Express Pick-up
fields.instruction:
• After exiting the baggage claim area, follow the signs for “Express Pickup”.
• Express Pickup is located in Parking Building P3.

fields.name: Rideshare (DiDi) Pickup
fields.instruction:
After collecting your luggage and exiting the terminal, follow the signs for 
'Rideshare' or 'Coaches' and walk to the Northern end of the terminal. 
Your pickup area is located in the designated kerbside zone in the Departures 
area. Please do not wait at the taxi or Uber zone.

See the map below for the exact location (marked with a red X).

fields.name: Public Pickup
fields.instruction:
• After clearing customs and exiting the Arrivals Hall, follow the signs for “Rideshare & Pickup.”
• Continue to the P7 parking building, then follow the signs for “Public Pickup"

fields.name: Priority Pickup
fields.instruction:
• After exiting the baggage claim area, follow the signs for “Priority Pickup”.
• Priority Pickup is located next to the Parking Building P2.

fields.name: Shuttle Bus bay
fields.instruction:
• After exiting the baggage claim area, follow the signs for “Shuttle Bus Bay”.
• Shuttle Bus Bay Pickup is located next to the Parking Building P3.
